webDevelopment.title: Web Development
webDevelopment.subtitle: Websites and digital products built with modern architecture, real performance and refined user experience — from the first sprint to production deploy.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: Understanding the business, audience and goals before any design or technology decision.

process.title: Strategy & Architecture
process.description: Defining information architecture, technical stack and content plan.

process.title: Design & Prototyping
process.description: Art direction, visual system and clickable prototypes, with an editorial and performance focus.

process.title: Development
process.description: Implementation with Next.js, TypeScript and a headless CMS, prioritizing performance, SEO and accessibility.

process.title: Deploy & Evolution
process.description: Launch, monitoring and continuous evolution based on real usage data.

playground.title: Playground
playground.subtitle: Visual studies, interaction prototypes and technical experiments — outside the context of client work.
